problem id: 034fb629
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(2) AND SHL(5)) XOR SHR(3)

examples:
  00001101 -> 00100001
  11100000 -> 00011100
  11110110 -> 11011110
  01011100 -> 00001011
  00101101 -> 10100101
  11001000 -> 00011001
  11100100 -> 10011100
  10111011 -> 01110111
  01000000 -> 00001000

query: 11001011
predicted answer: 00111001
